name: TEAMGROUP MP44S 2TB M.2-2230 PCIe 4.0 x4 NVMe Internal Solid State Drive - Heat Dissipating Graphene Label - SLC Cache - Read up to 5,000 MB/s - Write up to 3,500 MB/s (TM5FF3002T0C101)
shortName: TEAMGROUP MP44S 2TB M.2-2230 PCIe 4.0 x4 NVMe
description: A 2TB high-performance internal NVMe SSD with PCIe 4.0 x4 interface in compact M.2-2230 form factor with graphene cooling.
